glycoprotein.name: CTLA4-Ig
glycoprotein.description: CTLA4 ectodomain-IgG1 Fc fusion using fusion-protein numbering from the cited CTLA4-Ig literature. O-glycosites are concentrated in the linker/hinge segment.
glycoprotein.reference: Bongers et al. 2011; Zhu et al. 2014; Zhang et al. 2020

difficulty_heuristic: 0.40 baseline +0.10 if core_types include a sialylated glycoform +0.10 if the site is within 2 residues of another curated O-glycosite +0.10 if the site is within 2 residues of Pro +0.10 if the site is reported in only one cited study +0.10 if the cited literature explicitly describes low occupancy or site variability; clamp to [0.30, 0.95].
